name: Your futa stepmom gives your bully a stern beating!?
description:
Your stepmom gives your bully a stern beating!?

Your probably thinking this is some lazy NTR stuff where your stepmom gets banged by your bully. Not this time. Your stepmom Maki heads over to your bullie's apartment and makes him regret to have ever messed with you.

Character is Makima from the anime/manga series chainsaw man

Artist is Kunaboto
creator: karlUdo
